hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[BeekeepingIT] Nothing is built yet; source of truth (intent) is requirements/. When PLANNING a task, READ: requirements/ (context, FRs, NFRs, decisions, open-questions, tech-stack) — at planning, not implementation. Intent lives in requirements/; docs/ documents what gets built. As you implement, document the real architecture in docs/ (+ ADRs in docs/adr/). Decisions/requirements are revisitable: if contradicting one makes sense, get user confirmation, then update requirements/. Respect rollout order (D-10) and deferred scope (D-4). Full rules: CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/."}}'
if [ -f .claude/hooks/secret_file_guard.py ]; then python3 .claude/hooks/secret_file_guard.py 2>/dev/null || python .claude/hooks/secret_file_guard.py 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'; else echo '{}'; fi
